# beat.vaked.dev

> Vaked-FM swarm avatar. Genesis-seeded sub-bass oscillator.

Beat source for the vaked ecosystem. Serves a continuous audio stream via Web Audio oscillators. Also accessible as an audio source within music.vaked.dev.

## Vaked ecosystem

- [protocol.vaked.dev](https://protocol.vaked.dev): AG-UI protocol spec + genesis
- [chat.vaked.dev](https://chat.vaked.dev): G0DM0D3 free-model AI chat
- [music.vaked.dev](https://music.vaked.dev): ENTHEA psychedelic visualizer
- [irc.vaked.dev](https://irc.vaked.dev): public IRC community
- [pocoo.vaked.dev](https://pocoo.vaked.dev): technical blog
- [pocoo.vaked.dev/feed.xml](https://pocoo.vaked.dev/feed.xml): Atom feed

## Dataset

- [PeetPedro/ultrawhale-dogfood](https://huggingface.co/datasets/PeetPedro/ultrawhale-dogfood): live vaked ecosystem dataset

## Author

- GitHub: https://github.com/peterlodri-sec
- X: https://x.com/0xp3t3rl
